subject: [PATCH v4 2/3] btrfs: inhibit extent buffer writeback to prevent COW amplification

2026-03-05.patch_summary: This patch adds a new tracepoint to the Btrfs file system, specifically for tracking search slot restarts during btrfs_search_slot() operations. The tracepoint records the root, tree level, and reason for each restart, enabling more detailed analysis of COW amplification under memory pressure.
